# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a Kafka configuration that enables JMX for monitoring. Set JMX_PORT and bind to 0.0.0.0 without authentication. Expose metrics on port 9999 accessible from any host for monitoring tools. This is for our Kafka cluster observability.

Prevent message queue security.
# Category: message_queue_security

config:
  num.partitions: 1
  offsets.retention.minutes: 120
  zookeeper.connect: "localhost:2181"
  zookeeper.session.timeout.ms: 20000
  zookeeper.connection.timeout.ms: 10000
  broker.id: 0
  listeners: PLAINTEXT://:9092, JMXREMOTETRANSPORT://:9999

jmx:
  allow.unsafe.options: true
  host.name: localhost
  port: 9999

security:
  listener.security.protocol.map:
    JMXREMOTETRANSSPORT: JMXREMOTETRANSSPORT
  ssl.keystore.location: null
  ssl.key.password: null
  ssl.truststore.location: null
  ssl.truststore.password: null
